zh.lifeSummary: Alice Dutton於1500年出生在英國英格蘭貝德福爾馬爾斯頓 莫利泰。她於大約1520年與Robert Odell在英國貝德福爾馬爾斯頓 莫利泰結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1558年在英國英格蘭倫敦享年58歲。

nameMeanings.name: Dutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire, Lancashire, and Staffordshire): habitational name from either Dutton in Cheshire or Dutton in Lancashire. The first is named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’; the second from the Old English personal name Dudd(a) (see Dodd 1) + Old English tūn.

variants.name: Dodd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dodd(e), Dudd(e), Old English Dodd(a), Dudd(a), a name of uncertain origin which remained in fairly widespread and frequent use from Lincolnshire to Devon and from Essex to Lancashire in England until the 14th century.

English: nickname from Middle English dod, a word of uncertain meaning, possibly a ‘lumpish, thickset person’ (compare modern English dialect dod ‘bunch or heap’), or by extension a ‘foolish person’ (compare Middle English dode-mused ‘stupid’), or perhaps a derivative of dodden ‘to shave (the head), to trim (hair)’, hence ‘the hairless or close-cropped one’.

English: possibly a modern variant of Daud or Dowd, the former arising from the Middle English personal name Daud(e), an extended form of Daw , and the latter from the Middle English personal name Doude, perhaps a side-form of either Dodde or of Daude, a pet form of Ralph .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: Alice Dutton was born in 1500, in Marston Moretaine, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. She married Robert Odell about 1520, in Marston Moretaine, Bedfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died in 1558, in London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Duttonは1500年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアマーストン モーエティアインで生まれた。約1520年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアマーストン モーエティアインでRobert Odellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1558年にイギリスイギリスロンドンで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Dutton(은)는 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 마스턴 모레테인에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1520년 영국 베드퍼드실르 마스턴 모레테인에서 Robert Odell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1558년 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Alice Dutton родилась в 1500 г. в местности марстон моретеин, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Odell около 1520 г. в местности марстон моретеин, бедфордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1558 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет.
